Title: No, I Won't Download Your App. The Web Version is A-OK.
Description: As someone who prefers using services via their websites, I’ve gotten terribly jaded lately. Almost everyone wants me, and by extension, you, to use their darn apps to consume content and off their web versions.

Title: ABS  (Anti-Lock Brakes) - How They Work and Why You Care!
Description: From the history of early ABS systems to the latest complex vehicle stability controls, Dave takes you on a journey from 1970 to the present, covering how and why ABS brakes work.

Title: Leaving Middle East Till Things Cool
Description: In early March, due to the unexpected war in the ME, I was contemplating my next move. Should I stay or leave? Flights were still taking off from Dubai, albeit at a limited frequency. Enterprising car rental companies were offering package deals to wealthy expats where they'd drive you to Oman and get you on a plane to wherever (Oman was more open so there were more flights to more places).

Title: I give up on neovim
Description:
Note:
English is not my first language. The text below was written by me and corrected by an AI. I then corrected the AI’s corrected text, so there are probably still some wording errors
In 2022, I made a New Year’s resolution to switch from Chrome to Firefox, and from VS Code to Neovim.
My goal was to reduce my dependence on GAFAM tools, and it turned out to be a good decision considering this.

Title: How to Get Better at Guitar

Title: Good APIs Age Slowly
Description: Good APIs do not win on first impression. They survive change. This post looks at why stable APIs expose less, assume less, and age better over time.

Title: Is All Software Converging

Title: Don't Yell at Your LLM
Description: LLMs don't have feelings, but they have a dataset based on human interaction. It's probably not a great idea to behave in a way that produced negative results in the dataset.
